summary: Preserve non-terminal voice target locks across voice restarts and tie response audio source to target lock context.
Enabled no-focus-steal injection guard and verified transcription resumed without forcing Terminal frontmost.

verification.guardSignal: Point injection failed: skipped: target point app not frontmost (VOICE_NO_FOCUS_STEAL=1)

summary: Rebuilt click daemon with terminal-tty anchor support. Next Cmd+Option-click inside Terminal writes kind=terminal lock for deterministic transcript/audio alignment.
Response-audio watcher now falls back to Codex session JSONL (anchored to locked tty) when Terminal tab contents are empty, preventing silent replies on Codex TUI tabs.

verification.behavior: fallback reads only new assistant output (no backlog replay)

summary: Session fallback now resolves rollout file from the active Codex PID on the locked tty via lsof; start-time matching remains backup only.
Installed LaunchAgent keepalive for voice server (com.tnf.voice-bridge-server) to keep Chrome transcription endpoint stable at 127.0.0.1:50005.
Validated legacy interrupt behavior: user speech (/send) during active AI speech kills say/afplay, clears /tmp/ai_is_speaking, and continues transcription write path.

verification.logSignal: INTERRUPT: User is speaking over AI. Killing audio.

summary: Fixed voice loopback suppression normalization and hardened watcher auto-start detection so /activate reliably starts stream and response-audio watchers.
Resolved re-anchor typing outage by switching terminal target delivery to direct /dev/ttys* writes (with Enter support) when target kind=terminal, bypassing blocked System Events keystrokes.

verification.liveSignal: new beamed transcript lines without Terminal injection failure logs

summary: Synced legacy fallback target file (~/.openclaw/voice_target_tty) to the active JSON lock target (ttys009) to prevent fallback retarget drift.
Upgraded voice echo suppression to evaluate rolling recent AI-spoken history with stronger token/run overlap logic and longer default window for delayed STT captures.

signals: WRITING still present for unrelated phrase

summary: Replaced direct /dev/ttys* write mode with Terminal-native do script delivery for locked terminal tabs to restore submit semantics while bypassing System Events keystroke restrictions.
Fixed Terminal do script parser failures by passing transcript text through a temp payload file that AppleScript reads at runtime; eliminated syntax errors on punctuated transcripts.

verification.after: new beamed markers without additional injection failure lines

summary: Added explicit second do-script submit pulse for terminal target injection when press_enter=true to improve auto-return reliability in Codex-style terminal input UIs.
Replaced unreliable auto-submit simulation with explicit carriage-return pulse written to locked terminal tty after transcript injection.

verification.postPatch: no new Terminal injection failed entries

summary: Adjusted terminal do-script payload to append ASCII CR directly inside payload text when press_enter=true; removed external tty CR pulse.
Switched terminal auto-submit to real Return key events via cliclick, with frontmost-target keypress primary and focus-hop+restore fallback for non-frontmost target tabs.
Terminal target auto-submit now executes in the locked tab via single do-script call with inline CR, removing focus-hop/cliclick dependency for terminal kind targets.

verification.logSignal: Beaming markers continue with no Terminal injection failed errors

summary: voice_server now performs startup watcher reconciliation and periodic health rechecks so stream_watch/response-audio watcher are auto-restored after unexpected exits.

verification.killTest: killed stream_watch pid and observed auto-restart under voice_server parent

summary: Added similarity-based suppression for near-match TTS loopback and short-phrase overlap during active AI speech to reduce self-transcription bleed-through.

verification.objective: fewer AI-spoken phrases re-entering /send as WRITING

summary: Resynced ~/.openclaw/voice_target_tty to match active JSON lock to prevent fallback drift across watcher restarts.
Updated stream_watch terminal path to flush each finalized transcript line immediately when lock kind=terminal and press_enter=true, removing idle-window clumping before submit.

logSignals: Terminal injection: sent to ttys008; mode=clipboard-keypress; enter:key-num-enter

summary: Mirrored immediate-flush stream watcher patch into TNF voice bridge package and updated bridge report with operational notes for terminal submit stability.
Adjusted terminal submit from per-line immediate flush to low-latency coalesce window to reduce terminal scroll-jump while preserving auto-submit.
Re-verified active interruption behavior after coalesce patch: user speech while AI flag is active terminates audio playback and clears speaking flag.

verification.logSignal: INTERRUPT: User is speaking over AI. Killing audio.

summary: Resolved duplicate voice_server race causing intermittent transcription instability by resetting to a single server instance on port 50005 and reactivating bridge helpers.
Enabled commentary-phase assistant speech in response-audio watcher so live debugging replies are audible during active sessions.
Moved interrupt execution ahead of echo filtering in /send to ensure user cut-through always fires during active AI speech.

logSignals: INTERRUPT: User is speaking over AI. Killing audio.

summary: Added user-priority turn-taking gate: /send writes /tmp/voice_last_user_speech_ts and response-audio watcher defers speech for 2.2s after user speech.
Set VOICE_RESPONSE_AUDIO_INCLUDE_COMMENTARY default to 0 to prevent commentary chatter from talking over user speech during live debugging sessions.

verification.postRestart: no new spoken-from commentary entries observed

summary: Added persistent inode+offset state for voice_stream so watcher resumes unread lines after restart instead of jumping to EOF.

verification.recoveryTest: RESTART_RESUME2_A/B lines queued during downtime were injected after restart

summary: Adjusted voice echo filter to run only while AI is actively speaking, reducing false-positive drops during normal user dictation.

verification.evidence: post-patch user lines logged as WRITING

summary: Lowered terminal coalesce/max flush defaults to reduce perceived transcription-entry delay while preserving batched stability.
stream_watch now uses enter-first submit fallback (enter,num-enter) and retains queued transcript chunks on retryable injection failures instead of dropping them.

verification.retryBehavior: retryable injection keeps pending chunks queued

summary: When target terminal tty is not frontmost and VOICE_NO_FOCUS_STEAL=1, stream_watch now injects directly to /dev/tty with inline CR instead of skipping, preserving anchor delivery without focus hops.
Enabled direct tty-first terminal injection with inline submit and added post-speech echo-filter grace window to block trailing AI TTS loopback while preserving unrelated user dictation.

Reconstructed last-known-good runtime window (keepalive+interrupt+lock-tied audio) and restored stream_watch to stable submit profile by disabling direct-tty primary by default, hardening stale-target handling, and dropping queued chunks on retarget.
Restored known-good profile: clipboard-keypress terminal submit primary, interrupt-priority in /send, response-audio lock-target mode, auto-heal single instance.

verification.interrupt_probe: INTERRUPT_RESTORE_CHECK_1774572736 -> say killed + ai flag cleared

summary: Rebuilt known-good runtime: single-instance launchd service, click-daemon auto-start disabled, frontmost submit via clipboard-keypress+enter, no-focus background fallback via do-script, interrupt cut-through revalidated.

verification.interrupt_probe: INTERRUPT_SMOKE2_1774573288 -> say killed + ai flag cleared

fixes: activate process detection hardened (no false positives)
terminal injection switched to Terminal do script path (no System Events keystrokes)
details.verification: stream_watch beamed + marker found in target Terminal contents

fixes: terminal injection switched to Terminal do script path
tty matcher accepts basename and full /dev path

details.change: stream_watch terminal injection now uses direct tty write with newline submit, do-script fallback retained
stream_watch terminal injection now uses direct tty write with newline submit; do-script fallback retained
